SEARCH

Deprecated API

Contents

  • Methods
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    sprouts.Var.projectTo(B, Function<T, B>, Function<B, T>)
    This overload is ambiguous with Var.projectTo(Class, Function, Function) at the call site: whenever the first argument could plausibly be both a B and a Class<B> (e.g. a Class literal), the Java compiler cannot decide between the two overloads and reports an ambiguity error. Use Var.projectTo(Class, Object, Function, Function) instead, which supplies an explicit Class<B> and a null-object and is unambiguous.
